CustomProduct.title: CustomProduct
CustomProduct.description: A custom product added by the client/owner that gets persisted in the showroom database

description.description: A short elegant description of the product

image.description: Base64 string or image URL for the product image

isChester.description: True if the product is Chesterfield/tufted style

woodOnly.description: True if the product is solid wood only

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created

AdminSettings.title: AdminSettings
AdminSettings.description: Settings for the shop manager admin portal, such as custom passcode

passcode.description: The passcode required to unlock the admin showroom manager

products/{productId}.description: Collection of custom-added products created by the shop manager

settings/{settingId}.description: Collection of settings documents for app configuration
